title: CLI op-store read-back (fathomdb doctor dump-mutations); reserved-gap-34

commits.msg: docs(0.8.0): Slice 34 design memo — CLI op-store read-back (doctor dump-mutations); scope call = doctor diagnostic, not application query
test(0.8.0): Slice 34 RED — doctor dump-mutations parser + binary op-store read-back tests (F4-READ / reserved-gap-34)
feat(0.8.0): Slice 34 GREEN — wire doctor dump-mutations through run_doctor_verb to Engine::read_mutations; rows serialized inline (F4-READ / reserved-gap-34)
docs(0.8.0): Slice 34 — document doctor dump-mutations; ADR-0.6.0-cli-scope amendment; cli.md/op-store.md/published-cli/DOC-INDEX

tdd_evidence.red_proof: cargo test -p fathomdb-cli --no-run failed: E0599 no variant `DumpMutations` on DoctorCommand (parser.rs:182,193) before the GREEN commit
new_tests: operator_cli: dump-mutations added to DOCTOR_VERBS so t_040a/t_040b cover --help exit-0 + Usage, and t_036/t_037 cover the --json single-object shape on the empty-collection path

scope_decision.rationale: doctor dump-mutations reads back operational_mutations (the operator mutation log) over the EXISTING Engine::read_mutations seam; same dump-* family as dump-row-counts/dump-schema/trace. No query language (only collection + opaque id cursor + page limit), no surface over canonical_nodes. It does NOT re-open ADR-0.6.0-cli-scope Option B (search/get/list application query), which stays rejected.
scope_decision.adr_amendment: ADR-0.6.0-cli-scope.md amended in place (Status line + Consequences bullet, dated 2026-06-06): the 0.8.0 op-store diagnostic read-back is scoped IN under the doctor root as a dump-* diagnostic; application query verbs still require a re-open.

verb.json_envelope: { verb:"dump-mutations", collection, after_id|null, limit, count, rows:[{id,collection,record_key,op_kind,payload,schema_id,write_cursor} ordered by id], next_after_id }
verb.next_after_id_semantics: last row id iff a full page (rows.len()==limit) was returned; else null (log exhausted at this exclusive cursor — no overlap on resume)

facade_surface_proof: rows serialized INLINE in run_doctor; OpStoreRow never named/re-exported. fathomdb facade crate src byte-unchanged vs baseline; tests/governed_surface.rs (3) + tests/reexports.rs (1) green.

byte_freeze_verified.recovery_suites: git diff --exit-code BASE -- test_no_recovery_surface.py no-recovery-surface.test.ts no_recovery_surface.rs => byte-unchanged
byte_freeze_verified.py_ts_sdk_engine_facade: git diff --stat BASE -- src/python src/ts fathomdb-py fathomdb-engine fathomdb (facade) => EMPTY (zero changes). Slice is CLI-only Rust + docs.

governed_surface_pins_green.rust_facade_slice27: tests/governed_surface.rs PASS (3), tests/reexports.rs PASS (1), tests/no_recovery_surface.rs PASS (1)
governed_surface_pins_green.py_ts_conformance_slice25: NOT RE-RUN locally (toolchain absent: no built py extension, no pyright, no ts node_modules). Byte-freeze proof shows zero Py/TS/SDK source change vs baseline => conformance preserved by construction; CI re-runs full cross-language at the per-PR gate / Slice 40.

self_check_results.cargo_test_p_fathomdb_cli: PASS (parser 13, operator_cli 25, recovery_cli 11/7-ignored, perf-regression 12, lib unit 3+1)
self_check_results.cargo_test_p_fathomdb_engine_standalone: PASS (all targets green; per-crate, not --workspace, per Slice-27 lesson)
self_check_results.regression_pins: pr_g8_dangling_edges 8, pr_g2_get_by_id 7, pr_g3_read_collection 9 (Slice 33 extended), pr_g10_filtered_knn 6, pr_g1_search_hits 4, search_result_shape 2 — all PASS
self_check_results.mkdocs_build_strict: PASS (built in venv; 0 warnings/errors, no broken links/orphaned nav)
self_check_results.pyright: NOT RE-RUN locally (no pyright on PATH); no Python source changed => stays 0/0 by construction; CI-covered.
self_check_results.py_ts_functional_suites: NOT RE-RUN locally (toolchain absent); byte-unchanged vs baseline.

agent_verify_result: 0 violations, 1 blocker — AC-037 netns-deny-egress (unshare -rUn unavailable in this env; environmental, CI-covered at Slice 40, explicitly tolerated by the slice prompt §4). AC-050c removal-detect PASS (only added tests, removed none). All other ACs PASS.
blockers_encountered: RED commit initially blocked by pre-commit `cargo fmt --check`; ran `cargo fmt -p fathomdb-cli` and re-committed (resolved).

Local toolchain lacks pyright / built python extension / ts node_modules and mkdocs (installed mkdocs in a throwaway venv to verify --strict). Py/TS/pyright suites not re-run locally; justified by zero Py/TS/SDK source diff vs baseline + CI coverage.
additional_changes_made_in_scope: Added `dump-mutations` to operator_cli.rs DOCTOR_VERBS + a doctor_invocation arm (collection positional) so the existing --help / --json loop pins (t_040a/b, t_036/037) automatically cover the new verb.
next_step_for_orchestrator: Slice 34 CLOSED on local main (after merge). Reserved-gap-34 (CLI op-store read-back) closed. Remaining 0.8.0 ladder: Slice 35 (deferred-feature ADRs), Slice 40 (final verification — wires agent-security/AC-037 into CI, full cross-language conformance + pyright + Py/TS functional suites). No push/PR performed (local-main only).
